title: BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack Hardcore Version
description: Changes BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack to be compatible with Hardcore mode
body:
This is an add-on datapack for those who wish to play [BlazeandCave’s Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) in Hardcore Mode. ## Modifications - Advancements that require you to die are changed so that you only need to take damage from their respective sources instead. - “Handmade Blinding”, which ordinarily requires you to wear a Carved Pumpkin enchanted with Curse of Binding, now just requires you to obtain one instead so you don’t get stuck with one for the rest of your playthrough. ## Installation 1) Download this datapack **and the original** [BlazeandCave’s Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack). You should end up with a file labelled "BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack Hardcore version.zip". 2) Put both datapacks into your world. - If in a new world, make sure the Hardcore datapack is above the original advancements pack. - If in an existing world, you will need to run the command **/function blazeandcave:hardcore_install**. You **will** need to open to LAN and enable cheats in order to run this command.
Older hardcore versions (Click to view) (For Minecraft 1.18.2) [1.13.6 Hardcore](https://www.mediafire.com/file/jmutguzyyxf4pfc/%255BUNZIP_ME%255D_BlazeandCave%2527s_Advancements_Pack_1.13.6_H%2Ardc%2Ar%2A.zip/file) (For Minecraft 1.18 or 1.18.1) [1.13 Hardcore](https://www.mediafire.com/file/01iuj7oiy370tox/%255BUNZIP_ME%255D_BlazeandCave%2527s_Advancements_Pack_1.13_H%2Ardc%2Ar%2A.zip/file) (For Minecraft 1.17 or 1.17.1) [1.12.4 Hardcore](https://www.mediafire.com/file/sm21odobm8y761e/%255BUNZIP_ME%255D_BlazeandCave%2527s_Advancements_Pack_1.12.4_H%2Ardc%2Ar%2A.zip/file) (For Minecraft 1.16.2-1.16.5) [1.11.5 Hardcore](https://www.mediafire.com/file/rlynl8vwl103w2b/BlazeandCave%2527s_Advancements_Pack_1.11.5_H%2Ardc%2Ar%2A.zip/file) (For Minecraft 1.16 or 1.16.1) [1.10.1.1 Hardcore](http://www.mediafire.com/file/txwjgzlvmh80a8n/BlazeandCave%2527s_Advancements_Pack_1.10.1.1_H%2Ardc%2Ar%2A.zip/file)
